name: Daily Series Agent (Sheets + Episode JSON + TTS + Auto Increment)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "gpt-4.1-mini",
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "response_format": {"type":"json_object"},
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a content publishing agent. Output ONLY valid JSON. No extra text. Use the schema exactly and do not add extra keys."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Create TODAY’S EPISODE package for a daily series.

Series info:
- series_id: " + $json.series_id + "
- series_title: " + $json.series_title + "
- series_bible: " + $json.series_bible + "

Today:
- part: " + $json.part + "
- platforms: " + $json.platforms + "
- language: " + $json.language + "
- target length: " + $json.length_sec + " seconds
- audio mode: " + $json.audio_mode + "

Rules:
- Strong hook in first 1–2 seconds
- Short sentences, one clear idea
- End with cliffhanger + CTA for tomorrow
- Must include Audio Package (voiceover script + delivery notes + TTS settings + music direction + SFX cues + mix notes)
- No copyrighted songs, no celebrity voice imitation, no unsafe advice

Return JSON in THIS EXACT SCHEMA (no extra keys):
{
  "series_id": string,
  "part": number,
  "episode_title": string,
  "short_video": {
    "length_sec": number,
    "hook": string,
    "spoken_script": string,
    "on_screen_text": string[],
    "cta": string,
    "caption": string,
    "hashtags": string[],
    "youtube": {
      "title_ideas": string[],
      "thumbnail_text": string[]
    },
    "visual_direction": string[]
  },
  "audio": {
    "mode": "tts"|"human"|"hybrid",
    "voiceover_script": string,
    "delivery_notes": string,
    "tts_settings": {
      "language": string,
      "accent": string,
      "style": string,
      "speed": number,
      "pitch": number
    },
    "pronunciation": string[],
    "music_direction": string,
    "sfx_cues": string[],
    "mix_notes": string
  },
  "tomorrow_teaser": string
}"
    }
  ]
}
